description: The Goda-ikka is a yakuza group based in Yamaguchi, Japan, formed in 1948 as the Goda-gumi by Koichi Goda. It is the largest yakuza group in Yamaguchi Prefecture, with an estimated 30 members. The group was renamed Goda-ikka in 1968 and became a designated yakuza group in 1992. It is a member of the anti-Yamaguchi federation Gosha-kai.
